problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: The key to What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? is Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene — specifically Viral vector delivery — which would help 19,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
